clean_story:
Now I will teach you Long.

Look at stick—short stick, long stick. Short stick fits in hand, long stick reaches past arm, past chest, maybe to ground. Like river—some steps cross, some walk many sun-paths to end. Like shadow when sun sits low—stretches far, not fat, just pulls away. If beast leaves many foot-prints in line, not side-by-side—that is long way. When you see thing go more eye-flicks side-to-side than up-down—that is Long.
